title: Bright Source 6ft (1763mm) 28w LED T8 Tube, 2520lm, 3000K Warm White, Replacement for 70w T8 Fluorescent, Starter Included - Direct Mains or for use with Switch Start Fitting with Magnetic Ballast
features: The Bright Source LED tube is a single ended wiring T8 LED tube compatible for switch start fittings that have an existing magnetic ballast and starter inside, as an energy saving alternative to traditional fluorescent T8 tubes. It is also capable of direct 240v mains wiring by bypassing any control gear within an existing fitting meaning two possible options for easy installation.

It is an easy direct retrofit to standard T8 LFL G13 sockets, ensuring they will fit withing existing T8 fluorescent tube fittings. They are manufactured with a winning combination of impact resistant polycarbonate and durable, lightweight aluminium.

These tubes are up to a substantial 2.5 times more efficient than their fluorescent counterparts and also require zero maintenance with an impressive 30,000 hours lifetime on average. The range comes in a several sizes, from the 2ft 9w all the way to the 6ft 28w. There are also three colour temperature options available; a cosy warm white (3000K), vibrant cool white (4000K) or vivid daylight white (6000K).
This T8 tube comes with 1 year wranty, additionally offering a generous extra 2 years extended warranty upon registration of the product with online registration.
description: Product Description SWITCH START REPLACEMENT OR DIRECT TO MAINS IMPORTANT: The Bright Source LED T8 tubes can be installed and operated in two ways: If your existing fitting uses magnetic control gear (also known as a switchstart ballast) and a starter, the replacement is simple; replace the existing starter with the LED starter provided, then easily remove the existing tube in the fitting and replace with the Bright Source LED Tube. If your existing fitting uses a high frequency electronic ballast with no starter, this will require re-wiring to bypass the ballast so the tube is wired direct to the mains. We would advise this is carried out by a qualified electrician. ENERGY SAVING LED T8 tubes are a fantastic way to improve the efficiency of your existing fittings or as an addition to new LED batten fittings or non-corrosives. They are 2.5 times more efficient than the old-style T8 fluorescent tubes they are made to replace so provide a substantial saving on energy. ROBUST AND DURABLE Combining the excellent performance of aluminium and impact resistant polycarbonate, these IK06 rated LED tubes are built to last for an average of 30,000 hours of use. EXTENSIVE SIZE AND COLOUR RANGE With an extensive range made to mirror existing T8 fluorescent tubes, these Bright Source LED tubes include a 2ft, 3ft, 4ft, 5ft and 6ft version. Each size comes in either a 3000K warm white, 4000K cool white or 6000K daylight white colour temperature, it is guaranteed there will be an option suitable for your lighting needs. 2' LED T8 Tube 3' LED T8 Tube 4' LED T8 Tube 5' LED T8 Tube 6' LED T8 Tube Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Wattage 9W 14W 18W 23W 28W Replaces 2' 18W T8 Triphosphor Tube 3' 30W T8 Triphosphor Tube 4' 36W T8 Triphosphor Tube 5' 58W T8 Triphosphor Tube 6' 70W T8 Triphosphor Tube Colour Options 3000K Warm White / 4000K Cool White / 6000K Daylight White 3000K Warm White / 4000K Cool White / 6000K Daylight White 3000K Warm White / 4000K Cool White / 6000K Daylight White 3000K Warm White / 4000K Cool White / 6000K Daylight White 3000K Warm White / 4000K Cool White / 6000K Daylight White Lumen Output 900lm 1400lm 1800lm 2300lm 2800lm Dimensions 589 x 26mm 894 x 26mm 1199 x 26mm 1500 x 26mm 1763 x 26mm Starter Included ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓
